title: Arena Synergy Tensor: Fewest Trilinear Gadgets
strategies: trivial: one gadget per non-zero frontal fiber (matches the checker baseline)
greedy: cheapest of the three fiber decompositions (min non-zero fibers over a mode)
strong: exact slice-rank (CR) factorization along the best mode; beats fibers but not the unknown optimum
open: search below the slice-rank bound (planted rank is over-complete; true minimum unknown)
